title: AD Authentication Attack Checklist
when_to_use: When operating in an AD environment

steps.title: Initial Setup/Scanning
steps.instruction: Execute Kerberoast attack using GetUserSPNs.py to extract service account hashes
steps.tip: Start with the most reliable information source for ad authentication attack checklist
steps.expected_output: Extracted Kerberos TGS tickets from service accounts for offline cracking

steps.title: Data Collection/Configuration
steps.instruction: Perform AS-REP roasting using GetNPUsers.py on users with DONT_REQ_PREAUTH
steps.tip: Organize data systematically to avoid duplicates and ensure coverage
steps.expected_output: AS-REP hashes from preauthentication-disabled user accounts

steps.title: Analysis/Enumeration
steps.instruction: Crack Kerberoast hashes using Hashcat mode 13100 for TGS-REP hashes
steps.tip: Look for patterns and correlations in collected data
steps.expected_output: Cracked service account passwords from Kerberoast attack

steps.title: Advanced Technique/Filtering
steps.instruction: Crack AS-REP hashes using Hashcat mode 18200 for preauthentication hashes
steps.tip: Use multiple techniques to increase coverage and accuracy
steps.expected_output: Recovered user credentials from AS-REP roasting attack

steps.title: Correlation/Testing
steps.instruction: Deploy ntlmrelayx.py to relay NTLM authentication for pass-the-hash attacks
steps.tip: Validate findings across different tools and methods
steps.expected_output: Relayed NTLM credentials enabling lateral movement and escalation

steps.title: Validation/Exploitation
steps.instruction: Use psexec.py for pass-the-hash authentication and command execution
steps.expected_output: Successful command execution on target systems using stolen NTLM hashes

steps.title: Documentation/Reporting
steps.instruction: Document all captured credentials and privilege levels achieved
steps.tip: Review all findings before compilation for accuracy and completeness
steps.expected_output: Comprehensive report of all AD authentication attacks and compromised accounts
